return(function(R,U,t,O,q,z,Q,u,g,i,N,m,n,Z,A,E,P,b,T,M,I)b,T,E,m,A,M,Z,N,n,P,i,g,I,u=function(R)N[R]=N[R]-(470409+-470408)if N[R]==270573+-270573 then N[R],P[R]=nil,nil end end,function(R,H)local
